title: MALACASA Large Salad Bowls, Soup Bowl Set of 4, Porcelain Cereal Bowl, White Serving Bowls, Perfect for Noodles, Desserts and Breakfast, 800ML, Microwave and Dishwasher Safe, Serie Regular
features: 【Classic Design】Bowls set of 4. Capacity: 800ML. Dimensions (each): 15.3x6.6 cm/ 6x2.5 inch. The white soup bowls set impresses with its ecological design with ivory white porcelain in a round shape. The new designed ivory white tone and classic round shape design make great all-purpose restaurant style cereal bowl, the dessert bowls not only ideal for preparing delicious cereal and fruit, but also perfect for serving rice and dessert.

【Sturdier Than Other Ceramics/Stoneware & Lead Free Glaze】 MALACASA salad bowls crafted through high-temperature firing at 1400 degrees Celsius, the superior heat resistance ensures the longevity of your dining essentials. Our porcelain white bowls guarantees chip and crack resistant, scratch resistant. No need to worry about scratches from your forks or knives. The round soup bowls are lead-free, cadmium free and non-toxic, you will never have to worry about any health problem.
【Dishwasher and Microwave Safe】 MALACASA serving bowls have undergone rigorous testing in globally recognized laboratories to ensure they are safe for use in both dishwashers and microwaves.

【Ideal and Pretty Gift Choice】 This size bowl set is great for serving entrees, sides, cereal, salad, snacks, rice, cut fruit & veggies, soups, desserts, home decoration and more. Ideal for family dinner, restaurant serving, friends party, food storage. Great gift choice for birthday, anniversary, wedding, housewarming, Christmas, Thanksgiving.

【12-Month Warranty & Customer Service】 Your purchase is guaranteed by our 12-month warranty against manufacturer defects. Our customer service team is always ready to assist you with any inquiries or concerns you may have. Experience worry-free shopping with us today! 【Note】 Ceramic products are handmade, and color differences, black spots, and other situations are inevitable. This is a normal process phenomenon and does not affect the use and appearance of the product.
